description: Narrative-driven content that traces brand origins, values, and commitment to quality ingredients and innovation, positioning the brand as thoughtful and trustworthy.
structural_recipe: Open with a value statement about what differentiates the brand. Anchor the narrative in authenticity—emphasize natural ingredients, meticulous selection processes, and adherence to quality standards. Use emotional language (إخلاص، عناية) to convey care and dedication. Conclude with proof points (award wins, product achievements). Include heart emoji or visual markers of excellence. Write in Modern Standard Arabic with accessible, warm tone.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to authenticity narratives that emphasize heritage, craftsmanship, and ethical sourcing. Brand origin stories align with Islamic values of integrity (أمانة) and excellence (إتقان). Transparency about ingredient selection builds trust in premium beauty categories where provenance and purity are purchase drivers.
transplantation_caveats: Claims about 'natural' and 'pure' ingredients must be substantiated—unverified claims risk regulatory backlash in Saudi market
Religious language (إخلاص) works well but avoid conflating brand values with religious doctrine
Awards and certifications mentioned must be verifiable or risk credibility damage on socially-connected Saudi audiences
cultural_constraints: Must emphasize halal/ethical sourcing if mentioning ingredients
Avoid imagery or language suggesting Western-only quality standards; frame excellence as universal
